question: How did the Brazilian police respond to the anti-Bolsonaro protest in Recife in May 2021?
ground_truth: The police repressed the protest with tear gas and rubber bullets, resulting in at least one arrest and a protester losing vision in one eye.
event_desc: Protests against the Bolsonaro administration take place in various parts of the country. There is also a record of a protests by Brazilian citizens in Paris.
